# Paste vlv v1.3.1

## Fixes

- Preserve native rich-text formatting in clipboard cards.
- Improve text-card previews so structured content stays readable.

## Download

Download `Paste-vlv-1.3.1-macos-unsigned.zip` from this release.

This build is ad-hoc signed, not Developer ID signed, and not notarized. macOS
may show a Gatekeeper warning on first launch. Build from source if you prefer
to inspect or modify it.
